primary_hypothesis: H1_inv: KG multi-op generates more investigable hypotheses than random/single-op

success_criteria.SC_inv_primary: C2 investigability > C_rand_v2 investigability, Fisher p < 0.05
success_criteria.SC_inv_secondary: C2 investigability > C1 investigability, Fisher p < 0.10

sensitivity_analysis: known_fact threshold at 20/50/100/200 — exploratory only, does not change primary conclusion
notes: This experiment is NOT intended to rescue SC-1r (novel_supported_rate FAIL in run_017).
The sole purpose is to replicate SC-3r (investigability PASS, p=0.0007) with larger N.
SC-1r was definitively FAIL in run_017 and is not re-tested here.
If SC_inv_primary FAIL, investigability hypothesis is rejected. No further phases.
Pre-registered before any data collection to prevent HARKing from run_017 SC-3r result.
